errors.noFileID: File ID missing - couldn't open file.
errors.notAWhiteboard: You must select a whiteboard, not a regular image. Usage instructions
errors.syncIDNotFound: Couldn't find SyncID in document for drawing, make sure you're trying to edit a whiteboard that is included in at least a note.
errors.createUnknown: Unknown error while creating editor, please try again.
errors.invalidBackgroundColor: Invalid background color! Please enter an HEX color, like #000000 (black) or #FFFFFF (white). The old background color will be used.
errors.multipleSyncIDs: Multiple syncIDs found in documents. Remove the drawings that don't exist from your documents. Sync conflict copies can cause this error, so make sure to delete them. File IDs (the part you can change in the Rename menu) must be unique across all documents. Full explanation
errors.unchangedProtyle: Make sure the image you're trying to edit still exists in your documents.
errors.saveGeneric: Error saving! The current drawing has been copied to your clipboard. You may need to create a new drawing and paste it there.
errors.mustSelect: Select a whiteboard in your document by left-clicking it, then use this icon/shortcut to open the editor directly. Usage instructions
errors.mustOpenDocument: No active document. You must select a document before using this shortcut.

createConfirm.title: Create Whiteboard
createConfirm.message:
No whiteboard is selected, so a new one will be created at the current cursor position. Proceed?
You can select a whiteboard by left-clicking it before triggering the shortcut.
You can also change the default behavior in the plugin settings.

unsavedConfirm.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedConfirm.message: You closed an editor with pending changes, so they were automatically saved. Do you wish to roll them back?

grid.title: Enable grid by default
grid.description: Enable to automatically turn on the grid on new whiteboards.

backgroundDropdown.title: Background color
backgroundDropdown.description: Default background color for new whiteboards.

background.title: Custom background
background.description:
Hexadecimal code of the custom background color for new whiteboards.
This setting is only applied if "Background Color" is set to "Custom"!

dialogOnDesktop.title: Open editor as dialog on desktop
dialogOnDesktop.description:
Dialog mode provides a larger drawing area, but it's not as handy to use as tabs (default).
The editor will always open as a dialog on mobile.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Enable to send anonymous usage data to the developer. Privacy Policy

restorePosition.title: Remember editor position
restorePosition.description: When enabled, the editor will remember the zoom factor and position, and it will restore them the next time you open the same whiteboard.

noSelectionAction.title: Shortcut without selection
noSelectionAction.description: What to do when the shortcut is pressed but no whiteboard is selected.

imageColorInversion.title: Apply image color inversion
imageColorInversion.description: Invert whiteboard colors when SiYuan is on a specific theme, so that whiteboards are always consistent with your SiYuan theme.

additionalPens.title: Additional pens
additionalPens.description: Number of additional pens (beyond the default 3) to show in the toolbar.

stylusSettings.title: Stylus Settings
stylusSettings.helpText: Configure input stabilization and autocorrect parameters for all pens.
stylusSettings.moreSettings: More settings are available in the plugin settings page.
